description: Clean grounded policy quote — all checks should pass

inputs.draftContent: Hi Sarah, returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unworn items with original tags attached. You can start a return from your order page in the account dashboard — let me know if you need help finding it.
chunks: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unworn items with original tags attached. Customers can start a return from their order page in the account dashboard.
